overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exploring an abandoned industrial complex in a desert environment. The character walks across open asphalt areas past warehouse buildings, investigates a small structure with a covered porch, and continues through the expansive facility under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with warehouse buildings

events.description: character turns left and begins walking toward the small building and tree cluster

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the open asphalt past large warehouse buildings, then turning toward a small structure in the distance

entered.detail: long single-story industrial building with multiple garage doors
tall wooden electrical transmission tower with crossbars
small rectangular structure with flat roof visible in the distance
group of green leafy trees providing contrast to the industrial setting

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide open asphalt yard in an industrial desert complex. Large warehouse buildings line the left side while power line towers stand to the right. The character turns left toward a small beige building and cluster of trees in the mid-distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: small utility building with wooden pergola

events.description: approaching the small beige building with wooden pergola structure
character stops briefly at the building door then turns to continue around the structure

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking around the small beige building, briefly stopping at the door before continuing past the covered porch area

entered.detail: covered porch structure with wooden beams extending from the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the small beige utility building featuring a wooden pergola over the entrance. She walks around the structure, pausing briefly at the door, then continues past the covered porch. The large warehouses and power lines recede into the background as the building becomes the focal point.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive industrial tarmac with distant hangars

events.description: leaving the small building behind and returning to the open industrial yard
character turns right toward the large hangar buildings with red roof trim

agents.ego_description: walking away from the small building across the open asphalt toward larger hangar structures visible in the distance

entered.detail: massive industrial hangar with red trim along the roofline and multiple bay doors

segments.scene_description: The character departs the small building and walks across the expansive industrial tarmac. Large hangar buildings with distinctive red roof trim become visible on the right side. The character turns toward these structures as she continues exploring the deserted facility, with mountains visible in the far background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate industrial yard that shifts from wide-open asphalt plains to the intimate detail of a small utility building before expanding back into a vast complex. It begins with the character traversing a wide asphalt expanse flanked by large warehouses and power line towers, moving steadily toward a small beige building and a cluster of trees. As she reaches the structure, the camera tightens its focus on the wooden pergola and covered porch, momentarily distancing the larger industrial backdrop. The scene then opens back up as she departs the building and crosses the expansive tarmac, where the perspective shifts toward massive hangars with red roof trim. Finally, the camera tracks her movement across the deserted facility, revealing distant mountains under the bright midday sun.
